title: The Bloc — What Holds the Twelve
description: Aekon's twelfth district is closed for reasons no one in office today is alive to remember. High Chancellor Xochi's ceremonial discipline cracks the day a Dinye elder visits the closed district. You can be in the city when it happens.

objectives.description: Witness the Dinye elder's state visit
Notice the brief unguarded moment when Xochi acknowledges what the district is

title: The Bloc — Breach or Protect
description: You know what the twelfth district holds: the survivors of Aekon's stranded transit, broken by the wormhole's fold, hidden for four generations because admitting them would force Aekon to rewrite its self-image. The Bloc holds because Dinye and Asbir know. You also know.

objectives.description: Decide: enter the district yourself, broker a public acknowledgement, expose to Fluxom, or keep silent

branch_consequences.enter_district: You see what four generations of stranded-transit damage looks like. The descendants are not broken in the way the kingdom believes. Some of them want out. You can carry messages. The Bloc cracks gently.
branch_consequences.broker_public_acknowledgement: Aekon issues a state acknowledgement. The Bloc doesn't break — it ratifies. Reputation +25 with Aekon, Dinye, Asbir. Concord_alignment +0.15.
branch_consequences.expose_to_fluxom: Fluxom uses the secret to weaken the Bloc. Aekon hates you. Fluxom rewards you. Concord_alignment -0.10.
branch_consequences.keep_silent: The Bloc holds. The descendants stay hidden another generation. Concord_alignment -0.05 (silence on a substrate truth).
